channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-07-17 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [07/17] Varukers / Dead Sky / Ultimate Disaster / Bullshit Detector / Demencia Alkoholika / Ultimatum @ Shred Shed
item.description:
UK punk legends The Varukers headline a massive punk/hardcore bill at the Shred Shed on July 17th.

Venue: Shred Shed

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] The Sloppy Boys @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
The Sloppy Boys bring their high-energy rock show to Bottlerocket on Friday, July 17.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] Kame House Presents: Chaepter, Vireo, Hags 95 @ Kame House
item.description:
Kame House brings Chicago's Chaepter alongside local acts Vireo and Hags 95 for a sober all-ages show at The Station in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Kame House

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] 2020k x Popbaby x Lorelai at 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby at 222 Ormsby
item.description:
7/17, 7PM, $10 at door. 3 of Pop Music's most daring artists share the stage at 222 Ormsby for one night only.

Venue: 222 Ormsby at 222 Ormsby

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] Dark Room (All Ages) @ Grim Wizard Coffee
item.description:
The Kult presents Dark Room, a free goth/industrial/metal and alt dance night at Grim Wizard in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Grim Wizard Coffee

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] Sherlock Holmes and the Web of Deceit @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Pittsburgh Savoyards present a theatrical adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes, adapted by Robert Hockenberry, running July 10–26, 2026.

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] Cate Kennan, Bed Load, Sevend, Swatchdj @ Ask a punk
item.description:
An indie/experimental show featuring LA's Cate Kennan (Kranky Records) with local Pittsburgh acts Bed Load, Sevend, and DJ Swatchdj at a secret location.

Venue: Ask a punk

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] Brotality w/ Quantifier @ Spirit
item.description:
Modern metalheads Brutality bring their 'Tourn From My Hands' tour to Spirit Lodge with support from Quantifier.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] The Day The Rock Room Turned Day-Glo @ Rock Room
item.description:
A vinyl DJ night celebrating punk, new wave, power pop, post-punk, and 80s synth wave with six DJs, tricks, and treats.

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] July Open Mic at Community Forge @ Community Forge at Community Forge
item.description:
Open Mic &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Open Stage with a live band of Pittsburgh's most talented musicians!

Venue: Community Forge at Community Forge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/17] Bad Girls @ Belvederes
item.description:
Bad Girls with Gunray at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/18] Mysteries on the Mon Festival @ Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)
item.description:
A free all-ages music and arts festival on the Monongahela riverfront in West Homestead.

Venue: Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/18] Petrichor Release Party - Issue 01 @ Skypomp
item.description:
Celebrate the launch of Petrichor Issue 01 with music by Molly Goblin, snacks, and wine at Skypomp Art Gallery in Downtown Pittsburgh.

Venue: Skypomp

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/18] Technique @ Belvederes
item.description:
Technique — an early 80s dance party at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive, 6:30–10pm.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/18] Warring Factions, The Parishables & Last Protocol @ Porky&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s Bar and Grill
item.description:
Three-band rock show at Porky's Bar and Grill in Etna, PA featuring Warring Factions, The Parishables, and Last Protocol.

Venue: Porky&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s Bar and Grill

item.description:

item.description:

item.description:
A sapphic celebration night at Poetry Lounge featuring live music from Pinky Swear and Lez Paul, plus DJs Cryptid Yinzer and Faerie Fey.

item.description:

item.title: [07/21] On Topic: Free Expression with Jacob Mchangama & Nadine Strossen @ City of Asylum
item.description:
